children.text: community economic analysis and strategic planning;
methods for improving and retooling enterprises now dependent on National Forest System land resources;

methods for expanding enterprises and creating new economic opportunities by emphasizing economic opportunities in other industries or services not dependent on National Forest System land resources; and

assistance in the evaluation, counseling, and enhancement of vocational skills, training in basic and remedial literacy skills, assistance in job seeking skills, and training in starting or operating a business enterprise.

children.heading: Existing educational and training programs
children.label: b Existing educational and training programs
children.text: Insofar as practicable, the Secretary shall use existing Federal, State, and private education resources in carrying out these programs.
